evidence.text: In regards to our online school, the user needs of creating course content, planning a class, learning support, and studying courses, they fall into the result of the core domain. They provide competitive advantage, leading to a high level of differentiation. They embody complexity, and they tend to change often and are not widespread in every other business system. It is the core domain that we will want to strategically invest in most, and that's where we will have the most opportunity for innovation.
